titleStmt.title: SII 15.68: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 68. (B.K. No. 221 of 1926-27.) ABBĪGĒRI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of the village chāvaḍi.
This is dated the 4th regnal year of the king, Viśvāvasu, Phālguṇa-amāvāsyā, [Monday], the tithi corresponding to 1186 A.D., March 22. The week day, however, was Saturday.

It refers to Bijjaṇa and Vikramāditya, the Sinda subordinates of the king, as governing the country and mentions Abbeyageṟe (modern Abbīgēri). It records a gift of land made by Vikramāditya for worship and offerings to the god Kuppēśvara presumably at Abbeyageṟe mentioned at the beginning of the inscription. The epigraph is much damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēsvara cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
ttribhuva ttarōttarābhivṛddhi
pravarddhamāna ttamire tatpādapadu
mōpajīvigaḷu rappa śrīma
tu bijjaṇadēvaṁ vikramādityadēvarasaruṁ sukasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rā
jyaṁ bbeyageṟeya
damaged
śrīmaccāḷukyacakra
vartti tribhuvanamalladēvavarṣada 4 neya viśvāvasu saṁvatsara
da phālguṇadamāvāsya sōmavāra byatīpāta śrīkuppēśvaradēvara pū
je vikramādityadēvarasaru koṭṭa
mattariṁ baṁniya dāriyiṁ teṁka
ṇageyya paḍuva mattaru 16 mattamā dēva lāḷagēriya
vondu [.]
© śrī ku�dēvara baḍaga �ōṇa�ā�yiṁ pa
ḍuva gaddeya keyiṁ baḍaga saiviḍiya dāriyiṁ muḍa
herṁmmāḍiya keyiṁ teṁka mattaru 20 . matta keṁ
gāḍu jāleya dāriyiṁ muda sarvvanamasyada mata
ru 2 .
Digital edition of SII 15.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
